200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, Lone Traveler delivers a circular attack and deals physical damage equal to 4% of their max health to all enemies in a small area around the unit. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the more damage their ability deal. Max damage increase is 20%. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the more damage their attacks deal. Max damage increase is 25%.

description 4/6

Once in a while, Lone Traveler delivers a circular attack and deals physical damage equal to 8% of their max health to all enemies in a small area around the unit. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the more damage their ability deal. Max damage increase is 40%. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the more damage their attacks deal. Max damage increase is 30%. - When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, all enemies take physical damage equal to 20% of the dead target’s max health. If an enemy dies from this damage, Lone Traveler restores 25% health.

description 6/6

Once in a while, Lone Traveler delivers a circular attack and deals physical damage equal to 12% of their max health to all enemies in a small area around the unit. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the more damage their ability deal. Max damage increase is 60%. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the more damage their attacks deal. Max damage increase is 40%. - When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, all enemies take physical damage equal to 30% of the dead target’s max health. If an enemy dies from this damage, Lone Traveler restores 40% health. - The less health Lone Traveler has, the less damage they take. The max damage reduction is equal to 60% and is achieved at 10% health. - Once in a while, when an enemy is resurrected, Lone Traveler instantly kills them and copies 20% of their stats for 10 sec. - Whenever an enemy dies, Lone Traveler steals a piece of their soul, taking 10% of all of their stats for the duration of the battle. - Once in a while, Lone Traveler makes 4 consecutives strikes against the enemy with the least health. Each strike deals pure damage equal to 6% of the target’s max health. If the target dies, Lone Traveler goes into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats increase by 20% for 10 sec. - When Lone Traveler dies, they are resurrected with full health, but all of their stats are reduced by 20%. When any dies, the stat reduction is removed. Resurrection triggers 1 times per battle.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When delivering the circular attack, Lone Traveler has a 60% chance to tear through the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 125000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy also takes 250000 physical damage for 4 sec.

description 4/6

When delivering the circular attack, Lone Traveler has a 60% chance to tear through the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 125000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy also takes 250000 physical damage for 4 sec. When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, for 5 sec, the unit’s attacks begin dealing additional pure damage equal to 10% of Lone Traveler’s max health.

description 6/6

When delivering the circular attack, Lone Traveler has a 60% chance to tear through the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 125000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 35% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy also takes 250000 physical damage for 4 sec. When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, for 5 sec, the unit’s attacks begin dealing additional pure damage equal to 10% of Lone Traveler’s max health. When Love Traveler’s health drops below 30%, they begin returning 50% of the damage they take to enemies.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The less health Lone Traveler has, the higher their physical and magic armor. Max armor is increase is 10%.

description 4/6

The less health Lone Traveler has, the higher their physical and magic armor. Max armor is increase is 10%. When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, the unit gains a shield that blocks any 5 attacks.

description 6/6

The less health Lone Traveler has, the higher their physical and magic armor. Max armor is increase is 10%. When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, the unit gains a shield that blocks any 5 attacks. Each hit in a series of consecutive strikes restores health equal to 50% of the damage they deal.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The circular attack reduces the physical and magic armor of all affected enemies by 40% for 7 sec.

description 4/6

The circular attack reduces the physical and magic armor of all affected enemies by 40% for 7 sec. When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, it can’t be resurrected for 4 sec.

description 6/6

The circular attack reduces the physical and magic armor of all affected enemies by 40% for 7 sec. When Lone Traveler’s attack target dies, it can’t be resurrected for 4 sec. When Lone Traveler is resurrected, the health and damage of all allied fighters is increased by 40% for 7 sec.

Materials

Restraints
Protective Fabric
Family Heirloom
Shadow Plates
Insulation
Suggested gears for the set
